goals: Calculate how much current savings will grow for purchasing vintage film equipment
Determine appropriate selling price for refurbished projectors with markup
Compare different discount percentages for promotional pricing

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and practical, interested in vintage cinema equipment and financial planning for hobby-related purchases
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic financial understanding but is not an expert in investment calculations or pricing strategies

end_condition: User has completed all financial calculations and has clear pricing information for their vintage cinema business
